title: ctenodon lewisianus
intro: Ctenodon lewisianus, also known as Lewis' ctenodon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenodon lewisianus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which is used to support overall health and well-being.
